title: Legall Buddy Demo
summary: Shravan Khunti demonstrated Legal Buddy, a centralized, in-house meeting transcription and summarization system designed without third-party dependencies for Sean's organization. The team discussed a locally-hosted solution with potential cloud deployment on virtual machines and scheduled follow-up meetings to advance the Phase One POC.

action_items.task: Schedule follow-up meeting to discuss contractual date for end of month Phase One POC

transcript_text:
[Callum Niven]: You know , summarize that , etc .
[Shravan Khunti]: Uh , you can get uh transcripts from teams , but this is more like a centralized system , and Sean specifically mentioned that they want to build a system which is in-house , which doesn't depend on any third party services or anything . So this is like a completely , you can see the link . It's a locally hosted . It's hosted on my PC . They can post on their cloud , on their virtual machines . So it's like a complete internal system without any third party dependence Yes , but for this demo I am of course using uh AWS uh transcript services , but for Sean we can have an in-house transcript , uh , uh , tool . So that's why I think this is like a good approach for him . So yeah , I pasted the link uh of the meeting and a board was dispatched to this meeting , and you can see this spot has automatically joined our meeting . It's no SAI buddy , and you can see it's a legal party demo . It's I can name anything I want here . So , yeah , based on the discussions we do , it is now recording everything live .
